plan.action: Move commit_update_prd out of deploy_gate and into commit_finalize, called only after commit_merge_to_main succeeds. In lib/deploy.sh lines 130-136, remove the commit_update_prd call so deploy_gate only returns 0/1 based on decision. In lib/commit.sh commit_finalize, insert a commit_update_prd call between Step 2 (merge) and Step 3 (append progress), so passes=true is set only when the merge has actually landed on main.

Update the comment on commit_finalize (line 168 of lib/commit.sh) to remove the stale note 'passes=true is set in deploy_gate before this is called' and replace it with a note that commit_update_prd is called here, after merge succeeds.

Verify all existing tests in tests/commit.bats and tests/deploy.bats still pass with the new sequencing. The deploy_gate stubs in tests/deploy.bats stub out commit_update_prd — check that no test relies on deploy_gate calling it. The commit_finalize tests (lines ~200-329 of tests/commit.bats) should verify PRD is updated as part of commit_finalize now.

Add two new tests to tests/commit.bats targeting the sequencing guarantee introduced in Step 1: (a) simulate a merge failure inside commit_finalize and assert that Input/prd.json still has passes=false afterward; (b) simulate a merge failure and assert that Output/progress.md is NOT appended. These are the only net-new coverage gaps after the sequencing fix — all other behaviors (commit message format, branch cleanup, progress format) are already covered.
Run bats tests/commit.bats and bats tests/deploy.bats to confirm all tests pass. Also run bash -n on lib/commit.sh and lib/deploy.sh to confirm typecheck passes.

testing_recommendations: New test (commit_finalize): stub git to fail the merge step, call commit_finalize, assert prd.json still has passes=false for the ticket — verifies PRD is not updated before merge lands.
New test (commit_finalize): stub git to fail the merge step, call commit_finalize, assert Output/progress.md does not contain the ticket entry — verifies progress is not appended on merge failure.
Regression guard: run full tests/deploy.bats — deploy_gate must still return 0 on decision=pass and 1 on decision=fail without calling commit_update_prd itself.
Regression guard: run full tests/commit.bats — all 33 existing commit tests must continue to pass unchanged.
risks: tests/deploy.bats stubs for commit_update_prd may need to be removed or adjusted since deploy_gate no longer calls it — check for unexpected stub interactions.
If any test in tests/commit.bats stubs commit_update_prd out of commit_finalize, those stubs now become load-bearing and must be kept in place for the new sequencing.
